_comment: Known-dead links in the ADR governance tier, baselined on adoption (2026-07-15) so
scripts/lint-docs.js starts green and ratchets down. This list should only shrink.
kind=retired-doc: the target was a tactical or perf-results file deleted ON PURPOSE
(the /feature wrap lifecycle + ADR 0020 retention policy both say git history is
the archive). The citation is dead but the content is recoverable. Fix by de-linking
to plain text naming the retired file, as ADRs 0020/0031 now do.
kind=dead-code: the ADR links a source file that no longer exists anywhere. Each needs
judgment: an ADR citing the component it deliberately DELETED is a legitimate
historical citation; an ADR citing where an implementation lives is stale. Gate each.
2026-07-16 docs-sweep remediation: de-linked the 8 retired-doc citations + the MainMenu
and PanSettings dead-code refs to plain text; removed them from this baseline.
